mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in nonfarm payrolls below 100k signals weak labor market conditions that depress corporate earnings expectations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of instances where PAYEMS declines exceed 100k, or the signal's IC drops below -0.05 in rolling 1-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in GDP and housing starts indicates strong consumer demand and confidence, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days through improved corporate revenue outlooks.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails when 60d returns are negative in > 40% of periods where both GDPC1 and HOUST show positive growth, or the interaction term's coefficient becomes statistically insignificant (p > 0.1).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly drop in industrial production below its 12-month moving average signals weakening manufacturing activity, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days through reduced corporate earnings expectations.
failure_condition: SPX shows positive 20d returns in > 50% of instances where INDPRO falls below its 12mo MA, or the signal's IC drops below -0.04 in rolling 1-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly CPI reading above 3% triggers central bank tightening expectations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days through increased discount rate pressures.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 55% of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 3.0, or the signal's IC falls below -0.03 in rolling 1-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous rise in unemployment rate and decline in real wages signals deteriorating labor market conditions that depress consumer spending, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails when 60d returns are positive in > 45% of periods where UNRATE rises and RSAFS declines, or the interaction term's coefficient becomes statistically insignificant (p > 0.1).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in housing starts above 1.2 million units signals strong demand for residential construction, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days through improved corporate revenue outlooks.
failure_condition: SPX shows positive 20d returns in > 55% of instances where HOUST exceeds 1.2 million, or the signal's IC drops below 0.04 in rolling 1-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in industrial production below its 6-month moving average indicates weakening supply chain capacity, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days through reduced corporate earnings expectations.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 50% of instances where INDPRO falls below its 6mo MA, or the signal's IC drops below -0.05 in rolling 1-year windows.
